$comment: NotesBridge listing for the Anthropic (Claude) Connectors Directory 11-step portal (claude.ai/admin-settings/directory/submissions/new). Field limits per SUBMIT-FLOW-ANTHROPIC.md. Secrets are NOT stored here; the reviewer password is read from ../.env.local by env var name. Submitting requires a Team/Enterprise Claude org with Owner access.

connection.connectionModelNote: One MCP URL for all users; each user authenticates via OAuth to their own account.

listing.tagline: Search and edit your Apple Notes from Claude
listing.description: NotesBridge connects Claude to the notes on your Mac. Search and read any note, create new ones, append to lists, or rewrite drafts — all from a conversation. Your notes never live on our servers: every action is executed on your own Mac by a small open-source agent you install with one command (npx apple-notes-agent), and the relay only carries each request for the seconds it's in flight. Write actions are always confirmed by you before they happen. NotesBridge is open source (MIT) and self-hostable, uses OAuth 2.1 with PKCE and Dynamic Client Registration, and stores no note content — the cloud piece is a stateless relay between Claude and your Mac.

primary: Find and read a note by keyword or title without leaving the chat
Capture a new note or to-do from the conversation
Append items to an existing list (e.g. groceries, packing)
Rewrite or clean up a draft note (confirmed before overwrite)
useCases.prerequisites: A Mac with the free apple-notes-agent running (one npx command) and a NotesBridge account paired to it. Reviewers can use the demo account, which needs no Mac.
useCases.readWrite: Read and write. Read tools: search, fetch, list_folders, list_notes, get_note. Write tools: create_note, append_to_note (non-destructive), update_note (destructive — confirmed first).

company.name: Dupree Ops
company.primaryContactNote: Primary contact email for review updates; not stored here.

authentication.detail: OAuth 2.1 + PKCE (S256) + RFC 7591 Dynamic Client Registration. Discovery at /.well-known/oauth-authorization-server and /.well-known/oauth-protected-resource. Scope: notes.

dataHandling.firstPartyApiNote: We operate our own relay + the open-source Mac agent; no third-party API is proxied.
dataHandling.conversationDataCollection: none — the relay stores only short-lived job payloads (TTL seconds) and the account record; no note content or conversation data is retained.

reviewerTest.note: Reviewers exercise every tool 24/7 with no Mac via the demo account (server-side sample notes). Password lives in ../.env.local, never here.
reviewerTest.instructions: Add NotesBridge as a custom connector (or via the directory listing), authorize with the demo account above, then: 1) 'List my Apple Notes folders' → list_folders (Notes, Work, Recipes). 2) 'Search my notes for sourdough' → search → 'Sourdough recipe'. 3) 'What's on my grocery list?' → search + fetch → milk, eggs, coffee beans, blueberries. 4) 'Create a note titled Demo idea with the body Try NotesBridge' → create_note (confirms first). 5) 'List the notes in my Work folder' → list_notes → 'Q3 planning'. All 8 tools run against built-in sample notes; no Mac or pairing needed.

compliance.note: Seven mandatory acknowledgments + Anthropic Software Directory Terms & Policy. These are the OWNER's legal attestations — the automation stops before them, same as the OpenAI policy checkboxes.
acknowledgments: Financial transactions (none — NotesBridge initiates no transfers)
